title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MULTI-SPECIES FRESHWATER HATCHERY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JABONGA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THERERFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5651; 112 OG No. 26, 3986 (June 27, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10813, May 11, 2016 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MULTI-SPECIES FRESHWATER HATCHERY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JABONGA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THERERFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the supervision of the Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources of the Department of Agriculture (BFAR-DA), a multi-species freshwater hatchery in the Municipality of Jabonga, Province of Agusan del Norte.

SEC. 2. Within two (2) years after the construction of the multi-species freshwater hatchery, the BFAR shall, through a memorandum of agreement, transfer its management to the local government unit concerned. It shall implement a training and phasing-in program for local government personnel on the management and operation of the multi-species freshwater hatchery.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Agriculture shall include in the Department's program the establishment of the multi-species freshwater hatchery, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act. The local government unit concerned shall set aside funds from any available local revenue in an amount deemed appropriate for the management and operation of the hatchery.

SEC. 4. The Secretary of Agriculture shall issue the rules and regulations on the supervision and monitoring, and the transfer or withdrawal, by the BFAR of the multi-species freshwater hatchery.

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on May 19, 2015, amended by the Senate of February 1, 2016, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on February 1, 2016.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 11 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
